pi_items.source: Task description strictly dictates the recipient email for orders.
Task description specifies "Send a BCC copy". The Magento codebase (Magento\\Config\\Model\\Config\\Source\\Email\\Method) defines "Bcc" as "bcc".
Task description strictly dictates the recipient email for invoices.
Task description specifies "Send a separate email copy". The Magento codebase (Magento\\Config\\Model\\Config\\Source\\Email\\Method) defines "Separate Email" as "copy".

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly define the target email recipients and copy methods. The order emails must be BCC'd to 'manager@nesthome.com', which in the Magento database corresponds to the value 'bcc'. The invoice emails must be sent as a separate copy to 'accounting@nesthome.com', which corresponds to the value 'copy' in the database.
